data.title: SUI and Jupiter (JUP) lead $620M token unlocks this week
data.description:

In addition, JUP releases 53. 47 million tokens valued at $26. 96 million. Major linear unlocks include SOL, WLD, TIA, DOGE, and TAO during […]

data.title: Will $620M in Token Unlocks Stall the Crypto Market Rally?
data.description:
Key Insights: The market rally had reignited only days ago, led by Solana’s clean breakout. Now, a heavy schedule of token unlocks is arriving, with over $620 million set to hit the market between August 25 and September 1. The timing is critical: fresh supply is landing just as momentum has been building
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/08/25/will-620m-in-token-unlocks-stall-the-crypto-market-rally/

data.title: Strategy Acquires Over 3,000 Bitcoins in Recent Purchase
data.description: According to PANews, market reports indicate that Strategy purchased 3,081 bitcoins between August 18 and August 24. The total acquisition cost amounted to $356.9 million.

data.title: Galmed Pharmaceuticals Adopts Digital Asset Management Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, Galmed Pharmaceuticals Ltd. (NASDAQ: GLMD) has announced that its board of directors has approved a digital asset management strategy as part of a new financial investment policy and capital allocation plan. The board has established a cryptocurrency committee responsible for evaluating and overseeing activities related to cryptocurrency investments. This strategy may involve using up to 50% of the company's cash reserves, currently around $10 million, to purchase digital assets.

data.title: Thomson Reuters Heir Faces Significant Losses in Crypto Investments
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Taylor Thomson, an heir to the Thomson Reuters fortune, reportedly lost over $80 million after investing in cryptocurrencies based on advice from a psychic. Taylor, a member of the Reuters family, collaborated with former friend Ashley Richardson to invest in digital assets. Following consultations with a celebrity psychic and other spiritual advisors, Taylor became heavily involved in crypto investments.

During the 2021 bull market, Ashley Richardson managed over $140 million in crypto assets for Taylor. However, the mid-2022 downturn in the cryptocurrency market severely impacted the portfolio. Guidepost Solutions, a consulting firm, estimates Taylor's losses to exceed $80 million. The firm alleges that Ashley executed more than 450,000 trades without proper authorization, putting Taylor at risk.

Ashley Richardson denies these allegations, claiming she acted under Taylor's instructions and that the trades were intended to manage liquidity. She also stated that there was no formal contract between her and Taylor, operating instead on a verbal agreement, and asserted that she did not profit from the transactions. The dispute has escalated into a legal battle.

data.title: IREN Expands AI Cloud Platform with Major GPU Acquisition
data.description: According to Foresight News, Nasdaq-listed company IREN has acquired 4,200 NVIDIA Blackwell architecture GPUs for $193 million. This purchase, supported by financing, has increased the computing power of its AI cloud platform to 8,500 GPUs.

data.title: Ontology price skyrockets 55% to hit six-month high
data.description:
Ontology price rose more than 50% to lead the top gainers across crypto. The altcoin gained as Bitcoin and Ethereum dropped, with the ONT price hitting a six-month high. ONT could retreat amid profit-taking. Ontology has defied broader crypto dumping to skyrocket more than 55% to highs near $0
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/ontology-price-skyrockets-55-to-hit-six-month-high/
